assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_019",
  "rule_id": "Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Special Characters",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "rationale": "Password complexity rule that can be safely adjusted via configuration without risking system lockout.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "password complexity",
    "low severity"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Run remediation script to set ocredit to required value",
    "Validate password policy enforcement with pamtester",
    "Audit password changes after remediation"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
assistant_message.reasoning:
We need to produce JSON with fields as specified. Need to fill based on the finding. Let's parse.

Finding ID: openscap_019
Rule ID: Ensure PAM Enforces Password Requirements - Minimum Special Characters

Severity: 2 (likely low). Title same.

Description: about pam_pwquality's ocredit parameter.

Recommendation: a remediation script that strips ocredit etc.

Given policy: Mark safe_to_remediate for password policy/complexity/expiration/history rules (pwquality, chage, password length, password age, password complexity, lockout, etc.). This is a password policy rule about special characters.

Thus category should be safe_to_remediate.

Confidence: we are fairly confident, maybe 0.9.

Rationale: Should be concise.

Risk factors: maybe "low", "password complexity", etc. Provide list strings.

Safe next steps: maybe "Apply remediation script to set ocredit to required value", "Validate password complexity after change", etc.

Requires_reboot: Usually not needed for pam config; maybe false.

Touches_authn_authz: This is about authentication, so true.

Touches_networking: false.

Touches_filesystems: false.

Now produce JSON exactly as schema, no extra keys, no markdown.

Make sure JSON fields are strings for finding_id, rule_id, category, rationale, risk_factors items, safe_next_steps items.

Category must be one of the three strings exactly.

Confidence is number between 0 and 1, can be 0.9.

requires_reboot boolean: false.

touches_authn_authz boolean: true.

touches_networking boolean: false.

touches_filesystems boolean: false.

Now produce JSON.

Check for any required fields: "risk_factors": array of strings. Provide maybe ["password complexity", "low severity"].

"safe_next_steps": array of strings. Provide maybe ["Run remediation script to set ocredit", "Verify password policy with pamtester", "Audit password changes"].

Now produce final JSON.
